response.overview: From the XConfessions series: a woman finds herself being deliciously punished for being a bad secretary.  Real couple Miriam and Jorge play a delicious sex game where she is his secretary for the night and suffers erotic punishment for every typing mistake she makes...  Based on i ama verry badx secvretary a confession by MagsLee
response.tagline: A woman finds herself being deliciously punished for being a bad secretary.
response.title: I'm a Verry Badx Secvetary
